arts.ttl: Swansea investor Luka Modric repeatedly made thoughts clear on Wales legend Gareth Bale
arts.sum: Luka Modric and Gareth Bale have been close friends and team-mates for well over a decade, with the Croatian legend always willing to defend his former Real Madrid colleague

QPR were heading for a frustrating defeat against Preston on Good Friday before late goals from Michael Frey and Lucas Andersen sent the away end into bedlam at Deepdale. The London club are unbeaten ...

arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's Championship clash between Queens Park Rangers and Swansea City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
